name: Dr. Prameshawari Krishnamurthy
title: Assistant Professor | Computational Linguistics & Language Technologies
introduction: People call me Param (short for Parameswari Krishnamurthy). I am an Assistant Professor at the Language Technologies Research Centre (LTRC), IIIT-Hyderabad, specializing in Computational Linguistics. We focus on developing cutting-edge Machine Translation systems and innovative evaluation techniques, as well as building linguistic resources for both major and low-resource Indian languages. Our lab also explores LLMs, Bias in LLMs, NLP for health, multi-modal tasks, and foundational research in Indian languages.

sidebar.location: Room No- F12, 1st floor,Information Extraction and Retrieval Lab, Kohli Research Block, IIIT-Hyderabad
